_note: FROZEN full-path-sim baseline. Re-baseline only intentionally (delete + rerun gen).

BOTH arms move (the cold-start ladder snap is flag-independent). OLD hashOff aa0da62f… → 079e1dd3…, hashOn 5b15222f… → d5f6a620…. The fix only IMPROVES: meanVolumeKg up (RDL now carries real load), absurd 38→34 OFF / 35→32 ON, crater 89→80 OFF / 83→74 ON; convergence + oscillation stable; hashOn != hashOff still holds (§B). dp_metric_types_v1 default-ON is forced explicitly OFF in both arms (added to FLIPPED_FLAGS), so it does NOT move these hashes — the metric honoring is verified on the live compose path + #70 matrix, not in this weight-prescription stream.
